overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a white coat walking through a sci-fi industrial alleyway and entering a building called 'Madame Sauvage's Place'. The environment features large pipes, neon signage, and transitions from an outdoor industrial area to an interior waiting room with distinctive yellow neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with overhead piping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the neon-lit entrance of Madame Sauvage's Place

notable_agents.action: group of guards standing near the metal shutter entrance

entered.detail: massive purple industrial pipe running vertically along the left wall
rusted corrugated metal wall with industrial framing
illuminated signage reading 'MADAME SAUVAGE'S PLACE' mounted above the entrance
large industrial roll-up metal shutter door with diagonal bracing
network of pipes and conduits running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor lined with massive purple pipes and corrugated metal walls. The neon sign for 'Madame Sauvage's Place' glows ahead, with several guards visible standing near a large metal shutter door.

events.description: character approaches and enters the doorway of Madame Sauvage's Place
lighting shifts from ambient industrial to bright yellow neon interior lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance and passing by the guards to enter the building

notable_agents.action: guards standing at attention near the entrance watching the character approach

entered.detail: the main entrance doorway with glowing yellow interior lights visible beyond
tall vertical neon light pillars flanking the entrance
the interior hallway visible through the open doorway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the entrance where guards stand near the metal shutter. Passing through the doorway, the scene transitions into a corridor illuminated by bright yellow neon pillars, with the interior waiting area becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior waiting room with neon lighting

events.description: fully enters the interior waiting room with benches and seated occupants

agents.ego_description: walking through the waiting area and turning to observe the seated individuals and room decor

notable_agents.action: person sitting on white bench near the Aurora poster
another person seated on bench reading near the wall clock

entered.detail: white modern benches arranged along the walls for seating
large circular industrial clock mounted on the wall above equipment
vertical glowing green poster with 'AURORA' text and geometric design
metal door with vertical windows at the far end of the waiting room

segments.scene_description: Inside the waiting room, the character moves past white benches where NPCs are seated. The room features a large wall clock, a glowing green Aurora poster, and yellow neon lighting. The character explores the space, turning to observe the room's occupants and decor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, industrial outdoor corridor into the vibrant, neon-lit interior of a waiting room. It begins by trailing a character in a white coat through a narrow alleyway lined with massive purple pipes and corrugated metal walls, moving toward the glowing sign of Madame Sauvage's Place. As the character approaches the entrance, the camera passes by guards stationed at a metal shutter door and crosses the threshold into a transition corridor defined by bright yellow neon pillars. The scene then opens into a spacious waiting area, shifting from the industrial exterior to an interior filled with white benches and NPCs. Finally, the camera explores the room, panning past a large wall clock and a glowing green Aurora poster under the persistent hum of yellow neon lighting.
